\tzpentry{ID5796}{Quantum Kaluza-Klein Magnetization Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5796 introduces Quantum Kaluza-Klein Magnetization Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Module\left[\begin{aligned} &\{\mathcal{L}_{\text{total}}, \mathcal{H}_{\text{unified}}, \mathcal{A}_{\text{action}}\}, \\ &\mathcal{L}_{\text{total}} = \WolframIntegrate \left[\mathcal{L}_{\text{gravity}}^{\text{acc}} + \mathcal{L}_{\text{magneto}}^{\text{gyro}} + \mathcal{L}_{KK}^{\text{extra}} + \mathcal{L}_{\text{coupling}}\right] d^4x; \\ &\mathcal{H}_{\text{unified}} = \PathIntegral\left[\exp\left(\frac{i}{\hbar}\mathcal{A}_{\text{action}}\right), \mathcal{D}\phi\right]; \\ &\mathcal{A}_{\text{action}} = \int_{\mathcal{M} \times [0,T]} \mathcal{L}_{\text{total}} \sqrt{-g} \, d^4x \end{aligned}\right] \end{equation}
